rows.title: Phryll (source term for a universal medium/field)
rows.note: No physical quantity is defined. Retained verbatim as source vocabulary in the lore lane; NOT imported into any solver. Falsifiable only once a source supplies an operational definition with units; none does.

rows.title: 'Collector' apparatus fragment
rows.note: Translated to the ordinary-channel apparatus model: any 'collector' is an antenna/electrode with a measurable capacitance and impedance (apparatus.electrode_capacitance_f). Falsified as an exotic device if its response is bounded by the ordinary artifact budget (G14).

rows.title: 'Density bridge' between materials
rows.note: Read literally it is a claim about acoustic impedance matching (Z = rho c), which IS implemented and testable; read as a novel coupling it has no operational definition. Both readings are recorded; only the impedance reading is computable.

rows.title: 'Phase conjugation' as a resonance mechanism
rows.note: Optical phase conjugation is established physics in nonlinear media; alpha quartz has no registered capability for the required chi(3) four-wave-mixing channel at the declared drive levels. MECHANISM_NOT_IMPLEMENTED_FOR_MATERIAL, which is NOT a claim that it cannot exist.

rows.title: 'Retuning' of a crystal by exposure
rows.note: Operationalized as a persistent change in modal frequency or Q after an exposure, measured against a sham-exposed matched control. Falsified if the pre/post shift does not exceed the day-to-day drift of the control (E04/E09).

rows.title: 'Portal' / 'time breakage' motifs
rows.note: Preserved verbatim in the private myth layer (C038/C039). Not a public scientific claim, neither endorsed nor mocked, and excluded from public assets by the source filter.

rows.title: Atlantis / CERN / Star Nation source motifs
rows.note: Same disposition as ORPHAN-006: private myth layer, retained without endorsement, no observable proposed by the source.

rows.title: 'Vortex' as a field geometry claim
rows.note: Translated to the log-spiral / stable-focus mathematics that IS implemented (spiral_cone.focus_eigenvalues, eigenvalues -a +/- i). A converging spiral trajectory is a real solution of a declared ODE; it is not evidence of a physical vortex field.

rows.title: 'Singularity' at the cone cusp
rows.note: REJECTED as stated: the cusp energy-concentration metric is ~1.44x, not divergent. A geometric point of high curvature is not a physical singularity, and the FEA shows a finite, bounded response. The G01 prompt forbids claiming a singularity; the measurement agrees.

rows.title: 454 ohm non-frequency value
rows.note: A resistance in ohms is not a frequency in hertz. Registered as a non-frequency value so it can never enter the harmonic graph; the frequency schema's `non_frequency_value` kind exists for exactly this (C04).

rows.title: 51.843 deg vs 51 deg 51' 51" (=51.8642 deg)
rows.note: Two DISTINCT angle conventions differing by 0.0212 deg. The P02 rule forbids silently merging distinct values; both are kept as separate registry entries (G001-G006) and neither is rounded into the other.

rows.title: 2.45 GHz ratio (microwave-oven coincidence)
rows.note: Registered as an arithmetic ratio motif with a look-elsewhere null. 2.45 GHz is an ISM band chosen by regulation, not a water resonance; the common 'water resonance' claim is false and is recorded as such.

rows.title: 7.6 Hz phi-EEG lead
rows.note: A frequency in the theta/alpha boundary. Retained as a frequency key with neighbour controls; any claimed match must survive the look-elsewhere correction. No EEG data exists in this programme.

rows.title: Vendor '100 nm' flatness/precision claim
rows.note: A seller claim, retained at SRC in the specimen record's `seller_values` block. It cannot become a measured value without independent metrology; metrology.specimen_record enforces the separation in code.

rows.title: Seven-turn one-litre 70 F historical coil
rows.note: Fully specified as an apparatus record and modelled by the ordinary-channel coil twin (turns, resistance, inductance, field, heating). Requires hardware to execute (E03/E05).

rows.title: Recorded source nulls and ambiguous experiments
rows.note: The source corpus records attempts that produced nothing. Under gate G48 a null is preserved, not deleted: a null result is not a failed project, and erasing it would bias the record toward positive claims.

rows.title: Contradiction: catalog vs measured specimen lengths
rows.note: The corpus contains disagreeing lengths for nominally identical specimens. Unresolvable without metrology; both values are retained in `seller_values` and the disagreement is reported by metrology.seller_vs_measured_delta rather than averaged away.

rows.title: 'Brushing' as an excitation technique
rows.note: Operationalized in E01 as non-contact acoustic excitation swept across 3 axes and 6 facets with calibrated SPL and randomized order. The source term names a procedure, not a mechanism.

rows.title: 'Sound key' sequences
rows.note: Translated to declared frequency sequences (F-registry) dispatched by the E01 protocol with neighbour controls. A sequence that 'works' must beat its own neighbours, or it is a look-elsewhere artifact.

rows.title: 465/787/880 Hz body-mapped source labels
rows.note: Retained as SOURCE LABELS only. The C04 prompt forbids treating chakra/body mappings as medical facts; they carry no medical claim, and this programme makes none.
